review_title: Best keyword and seo audit tool for me.
description: Semrush helps me to do technical analysis of any clients website, after analysis of website, i can make perfect report. How can i improve website rank, any amatures can understand. User interface and learning curve is very easy, even amatures can do well.
author: Bithi P.
pros: Keyword magic tools is awesome helps me to identify new low targeted keyword with no time. As well other services, it also have domain search option to study website keyword and search volume metrics. Result of semrush is more accurate than others.
cons: I did not fins any lacking in this software. In this price range it gives a lot.

review_title: Reliable Data That Helps Me and My Clients Grow
description: I’ve been using Semrush since 2020, and it’s become a must-have tool for my business. It has helped me grow by making it easier to access reliable data quickly and make informed decisions. More importantly, it allows me to support clients better by having all the insights I need in one place. I highly recommend Semrush for business owners and agencies.
author: Jose M.
pros: What I like most about Semrush is the quality of the information and how easy it is to use that data with real clients. I use it to show businesses where they stand with SEO, how they compare to competitors, and where clear opportunities exist to grow. Semrush has helped me win new clients by showing the tools and process I use, and it’s been essential for improving websites and blogs through keyword research, competitive analysis, and small weekly optimizations that add up over time. It’s a practical tool that supports long-term growth, not just reports.
cons: The main downside is that Semrush can feel overwhelming at first due to the number of tools available. However, the customer support team is very helpful and does a great job walking you through the platform, starting with the most important features and then covering smaller tools that can also make an impact. I often recorded support sessions so I could rewatch them later, since there’s a lot of valuable information and tips to absorb all at once. The more you understand the tool, the more value you get from it.

review_title: Unwanted add-on charges, no refund, and no easy way to remove payment details
description: My overall experience with Semrush started positively because the platform is powerful and offers many useful SEO and competitor analysis features. However, that positive impression was completely overshadowed by a very poor billing and account management experience. I was charged for an expensive AdClarity add-on that I did not clearly intend to subscribe to, and the charges continued until I noticed them. When I contacted support, my refund request was denied. I also found it very frustrating that I could not simply remove my payment card directly, and that removing the add-on required contacting support by email and waiting up to two weeks. As a result, my experience went from initially positive to deeply disappointing, mainly because of the lack of transparency and customer control.
author: Arsene S.
pros: The platform is comprehensive and includes a wide range of SEO and competitor analysis tools. Semrush
cons: The biggest issue was not the software itself, but the billing practices. An expensive add-on was charged to my account without clear and informed consent on my side, and once discovered, no refund was offered. On top of that, I could not directly remove my card, and canceling the add-on required contacting support and waiting up to two weeks. That creates a very poor level of trust for a platform charging business customers at this price point.

review_title: Not suitable for solo small business owners + inflexible refund policy
description: My overall experience was that Semrush is a powerful but highly complex platform that is not well-suited for solo small business owners without dedicated SEO experience or support. I realized within two days of resubscribing that I did not have the time or technical background needed to use the tool effectively, and I contacted support immediately after recognizing this. While customer support was responsive, the refund process was extremely rigid. Despite the very short timeframe and the fact that I had not meaningfully used the product, my refund request was denied and the case was closed as final. This left me feeling that there was little flexibility or consideration for small business owners who quickly determine the platform is not a good fit. This may be an excellent tool for SEO professionals or agencies, but based on my experience, it requires more expertise and time than many solo business owners realistically have.
author: Suzanne C.
pros: Semrush is clearly a very powerful and comprehensive SEO platform. It offers an impressive range of tools and data, and I can see how it would be extremely valuable for experienced SEO professionals or teams who use it daily. The depth of features and analytics suggests it’s well-built for advanced use cases.
cons: I resubscribed to Semrush after having used it briefly in the past when I had an assistant helping me. This time, I intended to use it myself as a solo small business owner. Within two days of resubscribing, it became very clear that I did not have the time, technical background, or bandwidth to use the platform effectively. I contacted customer support almost immediately, explained that I had not used the tool, and asked for a refund. I was polite, transparent, and acknowledged that this was technically a resubscription—even though my previous use had been with help and this was my first attempt to use it independently. Despite the request being made within two days, my refund was denied because the subscription was month-to-month rather than annual. The case was escalated internally and then closed as “final,” with no reconsideration possible. While I understand companies have policies, this experience felt particularly rigid given: •The extremely short timeframe (2 days) •The lack of actual product use •The reality that Semrush is heavily marketed to small business owners, despite having a very steep learning curve This platform may work well for experienced SEO professionals or teams, but in my experience it is not beginner-friendly and not forgiving to solo business owners who quickly realize it’s not the right fit. I would strongly encourage other small business owners to fully understand the refund limitations before subscribing and to be realistic about whether they truly have the time and expertise required to use this tool effectively.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The Swiss Army knife for maximizing digital marketing with competitive intelligence
description: Overall, it saves you a lot of time and work in different areas of digital marketing by centralizing everything on a single platform, with a fairly large database of keywords and backlinks, making it possible to analyze/work on any digital project, whether they are small digital businesses or large projects, their support is quite good, even offering a multitude of training resources and new AI-related features that they are introducing.
author: Jose A R.
pros: The Swiss Army knife for maximizing digital marketing with competitive intelligence: Keyword Research, On-Page SEO, Off-Page SEO, Local SEO, SEM, Visibility/Traffic Analysis of online projects, Social Media Marketing, AI-assisted SEO Friendly Content Generation and many more tools in a single platform.
cons: Although it has some features/functionalities with modular pricing depending on whether you want to activate them or not, there is a base price that includes many features that I practically don't use, and I would prefer a more modular initial price or a possible cheaper monthly fee.

review_title: Semrush, the digital marketers secret weapon.
description: Overall, the experience with Semrush has been positive due to its great depth of analytics and integrations available. I was able to get a very thorough look at the rankings, serps, and keyword optimization for each page and my competitors.
author: Joseph A.
pros: I like how easy it is to navigate the website even when there are so many options and features available. It never gets overwhelming.
cons: I dislike the reporting options that are available, as far as exporting and creating reports for clients. It didn't have the type of reporting that I was looking for.

review_title: A must have for any SEO agency
description: Overall, SEMrush it’s a great tool. We use it daily at work for many different reasons: keyword research, keyword opportunities, compare to competitors, backlink audits, etc.
author: Alexandra L.
pros: Helps to make an organic traffic assesment, make organic keyword research based on traffic volume, keyword difficulty, find other keyword alternatives, compare website behaviour with competitors, make reports, and find organic traffic opportunities. It’s time saving when it comes to keyword research, with the use of AI also lets you know if a website is able to rank on this keyword and what needs to be optimized.
cons: We operate on a smaller country with its own language, so many keyword information are not always available. The reports are based on SEMrush database so it’s not always accurate.

review_title: STAY AWAY FROM SEMRUSH
description: My overall experience was overshadowed by their rigid refund policy and difficulty of cancellation. Customer support is not really interested in helping you.
author: Daniel M.
pros: Easy to navigate, and powerful tracking tools make it easy to test everything from SEO to ranking online.
cons: This is not a customer experience focused business. I was showing a client the platform and trying to convince them to adopt it. I have sold many accounts on Semrush in the past. I requested a refund and was denied even though i requested it just hours after the initial charge. Not much thanks for opening several accounts with them for customers.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: NO TRIALS, NO REFUNDS, NOT WORTH IT
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I was on trial for multiple things on the platform and have asked for refund multiple times. They rejected my refunds and charged me for the whole year. I tried to ask for a refund they rejected it 3 times. Their tools that cost thousands of dollars are useless and not worth half of the price that they list it at. Will be moving on to AHREF. I'm new to the SEO game, lesson learnt. STAY AWAY.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Maximizing the presence of our retail store.
description: Organic traffic is our sales generator as an E-Commerce Manager. I rely on this in order to maximize the visibility of our store. It has amazing market insights, yet the worth of the money decreases when you do not utilize any of the sophisticated features.
author: Amir H.
pros: The quality of data in terms of search volume is outstanding, as it enables us to find high-converting retail keywords, as well as new ideas of small businesses online.
cons: The website construction and administration attributes seem to be as an after-thought and the customer care is usually sluggish whenever we have pressing issues concerning the security of our accounts.

review_title: Good SEO tool with strong features but some billing hiccups
description: Functionally, Semrush has done what we needed: monitor technical site health, track rankings for key terms, and give a quick read on how we compare with competitors. For several years it has been a useful, if not cheap, part of our marketing stack and has helped guide our SEO and content priorities. We did have a difficult experience around add-ons and renewal, which was frustrating initially. That said, once the issue was fully understood and escalated, Semrush support resolved it by removing the add-ons and issuing full credits for the disputed charges. Overall, the product itself is strong and we continue to get value from the core Pro features. With some improvements to add-on transparency and renewal communication, it would be even easier to recommend.
author: Joe B.
pros: The core SEO features are solid. The Pro plan gives a clear view of site health, keyword rankings and basic competitor visibility in one place. Site audits, keyword tracking and simple competitor checks are easy to run and interpret, which has been useful for a small B2B SaaS like us without a huge in-house SEO team. Once projects are set up, it’s straightforward to monitor how our SEO is performing over time and to spot issues early.
cons: The platform is powerful, but the interface and pricing structure can feel complex if you’re not using it every day. There is a learning curve in understanding which features and limits you actually need, and how add-ons interact with the main subscription. We did experience confusion around add-ons (SERP Gap Analyzer and Local Pro) and how they affected our renewal. At first, the focus in support was on internal refund policies rather than on clearing up the underlying issue. However, after escalation Semrush ultimately removed the add-ons we didn’t need and issued full account credits for the associated charges, which I appreciate. I would still like to see clearer visibility and simpler management of add-ons in the UI for business customers.

review_title: Great tool for marketing insights and organic search
description: Overall it is a great tool that we use for marketing, direction, content, and organic search rankings.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Site analysis, keyword analysis, SEO metrics, site health and diagnostics, search rankings, competitor analysis
cons: Platform is not intuitive or particularly user friendly. There is so much information sometimes it is difficult to navigate.

review_title: The dependable SEO and content toolkit.
description: Semrush helped us create smarter campaigns and avoid wasting time and resources on producing content that wouldn’t rank. It’s now a standard part of our approach to each new client site.
author: Andrew M.
pros: I enjoy the keyword tracking and competitor comparison, helps us to know where we’re gaining traction and where we’re falling behind. The content templates are great for shaping blog strategy too.
cons: UI is a little bit cramped when inside of it so many tools are crammed in. additionally, when you want more projects or reports, the pricing jumps high.

review_title: Really helpful took for growing organic traffic
author: Anna G.
pros: I’ve been using it for almost 2 years now and it’s really easy to use. I like the new features they’ve added, but what I appreciate the most with Semrush is how accurate and detailed the data is, which makes it great for starting new projects. Their customer support is also quick to respond and helpful.
cons: With so many features, the learning curve can feel overwhelming for beginners, and the price might also seem “high” for small businesses and freelancers.

review_title: Comprehensive and easy to use
author: Fergus C.
pros: Semrush has a comprehensive overview of website analytics, easy to navigate and easy to find issues to change.
cons: Website scores sometimes fluctuate randomly, and maybe more of a search engine issue but pages with similar descriptions are flagged when often unavoidable.

review_title: Powerful SEO Tool
author: Alexandra I.
pros: It's a robust platform that's applicable to content marketers accurate and reliable, which makes it a special thing for those engaged in article marketing
cons: While the long drag might be hard in the beginning, in the end it will be compensated by learning many interesting new things

review_title: Powerful marketing software
author: Andrew W.
pros: Semrush is the largest SEO tool available - quite useful if you've got the budget
cons: The pricing is on the steeper side for most features, and you'll find the daily search limits rather restrictive

review_title: Useful tool for SEO
description: Overall, its expereince is really good. It helps me understand my website better and plan my work. Its useful when you start practicing regularly.
author: Mohit K.
pros: Its easy to use. I can quickly check the insight without any issues. It saves a lot of time and for better decision.
cons: Its price. For small business owners, It still feels costly. Also, some tools take time to understand, and at times it feels little confusing.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: The One-Stop SEO and Marketing Information Suite
description: It's and excellent and reliable source of information about your marketing activity and offers competitor review data that can't be found anyway else, but is only as good as your ability to plan and execute strategies based on the data provided.
author: Stephan B.
pros: The dashboard provides a wholistic look at your business's marketing and SEO all in one place.
cons: The data lacks context and prioritization, and although there are thorough tutorials for how to address issues and execute changes, it must be done off-platform, not within the dashboard.

review_title: The version doesn't even allow minimal usage
description: I find Semrush's analysis features very helpful for my content research
author: Tenai S.
pros: It provides detailed features for analysis search and keywords for the content creation process
cons: It can be confusing for beginners and the free version allows absolutely nothing

review_title: Check website health
author: Kelli K.
pros: Like the website review to make sure pages and links aren't broken, how we can optimize content and SEO, etc.
cons: It doesn't tell you exactly where the error is on the page, so I have to spend time figuring out where the error is coming from and if it is legit

review_title: a solid SEM platform
description: considered to be one of the premier SEM tools to improve performance
author: James C.
pros: good platform for getting SEM insights and optimizations
cons: could be tricky to push updates from platforms into Google Ads

review_title: Robust & Complex
description: It is a robust platform for digital marketing professionals, offering extensive tools for optimizing online presence, but its complexity and cost may pose challenges for smaller users.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Semrush offers comprehensive SEO and marketing tools, providing valuable insights into keyword research, competitor analysis, and site audits.
cons: The pricing can be a bit steep for small businesses, and I find the interface overwhelming at times due to the sheer volume of features.

review_title: One of the coolest, but... expensive!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: SEMRush is the one of the coolest SEO analytics software. It can compare, predicts how many people will search on the keywords that I want to put.
cons: Whenever I tried to use the new tools or services in SEMRush, they ask me to pay it. Most of their services are subscription based, you need to be caution before you use the service. It end up being a lot.

review_title: Powerful SEO analysis tool for websites
author: Owen C.
pros: Semrush provides a really powerful suite of SEO analysis and data for our company website, helping us to understand how and why our website is ranking vs our competitors
cons: Prices add up quickly and there are cheaper alterantives on the market
